targets.rawSql:
SELECT (1 - (SUM(IF(VARIABLE_NAME = 'Innodb_buffer_pool_reads', VARIABLE_VALUE, 0)) / SUM(IF(VARIABLE_NAME = 'Innodb_buffer_pool_read_requests', VARIABLE_VALUE, 1)))) * 100 AS hit_ratio FROM `${mysql_compartment}#${mysql_instance}`.global_status 
WHERE VARIABLE_NAME IN ('Innodb_buffer_pool_read_requests', 'Innodb_buffer_pool_reads') and logtime > NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR;

panels.description: This represents the total time spent by user sessions either actively waiting for a resource (such as I/O, CPU, or locks) or actually using the CPU to process database work.
panels.title: DB Volume Write Bytes

panels.description: This represents the total time spent by user sessions either actively waiting for a resource (such as I/O, CPU, or locks) or actually using the CPU to process database work.
panels.title: DB Volume Read Bytes

targets.rawSql:
select logtime, VARIABLE_NAME, VARIABLE_VALUE from `${mysql_compartment}#${mysql_instance}`.global_status
where VARIABLE_NAME like 'rapid%' and logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${mysql_compartment}#${mysql_instance}`.global_status)

panels.title: HeatWave Overall Status Captured by Performance Schema

targets.rawSql:
SELECT rpd_table_id.logtime logtime, schema_name, table_NAME, NROWS, LOAD_STATUS, SIZE_BYTES, QUERY_COUNT,LAST_QUERIED,
LOAD_TYPE, LOAD_START_TIMESTAMP, LOAD_END_TIMESTAMP, RECOVERY_SOURCE FROM `${mysql_compartment}#${mysql_instance}`.rpd_tables,
`${mysql_compartment}#${mysql_instance}`.rpd_table_id WHERE rpd_tables.ID = rpd_table_id.ID
and rpd_tables.logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${mysql_compartment}#${mysql_instance}`.rpd_tables) and
rpd_table_id.logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${mysql_compartment}#${mysql_instance}`.rpd_table_id);

panels.title: RAPID Table Status from Performance Schema

targets.rawSql:
SELECT 
    digest_text AS query, 
    count_star AS execution_count, 
    avg_timer_wait / 1000000000000 AS avg_time_sec,
    max_timer_wait / 1000000000000 AS max_time_sec,
    last_seen
FROM `${mysql_compartment}#${mysql_instance}`.events_statements_summary_by_digest 
where logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${mysql_compartment}#${mysql_instance}`.events_statements_summary_by_digest)
ORDER BY avg_timer_wait DESC 
LIMIT 100;

SELECT logtime, source_ip, target_ip, channel_name, lag_seconds from replica.replication_lag 
where source_ip=(select ip_address from config.target_database where display_name='${mysql_instance}')
order by logtime desc limit 60
